# pfsense_firewall_nat_port_forwards (Data Source)

Retrieves all [Firewall NAT Port Forwards](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/nat/port-forwards.html). Port forward rules redirect traffic from a given external port or range to a specified internal IP and port.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_firewall_nat_port_forwards" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `nat_port_forwards` (Attributes List) List of NAT port forward rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nat_port_forwards))

<a id="nestedatt--nat_port_forwards"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nat_port_forwards`

Read-Only:

- `associated_rule_id` (String) Associated filter rule behavior.
- `description` (String) Description used as the unique identifier for this NAT port forward rule.
- `destination_address` (String) Destination address.
- `destination_not` (Boolean) Invert the destination address match.
- `destination_port` (String) Destination port or port range.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Disable this NAT port forward rule.
- `interface` (String) Network interface this NAT rule applies to.
- `ipprotocol` (String) IP address family.
- `local_port` (String) Redirect target port.
- `nat_reflection` (String) NAT reflection mode.
- `no_rdr` (Boolean) Disable redirection (NOT mode).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol.
- `source_address` (String) Source address.
- `source_not` (Boolean) Invert the source address match.
- `source_port` (String) Source port or port range.
- `target` (String) Redirect target IP address.
